title: 2Pcs Mini Metal Cosmetic Spatulas, Makeup Spatulas, Skincare Spatula, Cream Spatula, Beauty Accessories for Mixing and Sampling Plant Masks, Skin Care Creams, Eye Cream, Essences(Silver)
description:
【Excellent Quality】This cosmetic spatula is made of high-quality 304 high-polished stainless steel, with a smooth surface without barbs, not easy to bend, and can be in direct contact with the skin, suitable for long-term repeated use.
【Package List】The package contains 2 pieces of mini stainless steel cosmetic spatulas, the color is silver.
【Easy to Clean】This stainless steel cosmetics spatula can be cleaned with water and paper towels or with wet wipes, making it easy to clean quickly.
【Wide range of application】 You can use this spatula to stir and apply plant creams, eye shadows, various cosmetics, and skin care products.
【Unique and Practical Shape】The shape of this makeup spatula is narrow at the top and narrow at the bottom, which fits the cheek very well and is easy to use.
reviews_5s:
I love these for cleansing balms and face masks. I like the size and weight and how easy they are to cleanLove these, came with 2 pieces just as described. Makes my skincare feel more fancy and clean!I purchased multiple sets of these to use for personal skincare application at home. They're easy to clean and more hygienic than using fingers to dip into creams.It has 1 job and it gets it done.
Useful, beautifully simple, no frills, quality.I use the tub type chap lip stuff. So no more sticky or slick fingers. I know it will stand up forever, I just need to be careful not to misplace.
